5*x^28-19140*G^5*x^27+21108*G^5*x^26-6474*G^5*x^25+720*G^5*x^24-5*G^4*x^52+135*G^4*x^51-975*G^4*x^50+2835*G^4*x^49-3290*G^4*x^48+6400*G^4*x^47-44875*G^4*x^46+137190*G^4*x^45-180190*G^4*x^44+59120*G^4*x^43+82040*G^4*x^42-93050*G^4*x^41+232760*G^4*x^40-602135*G^4*x^39+687020*G^4*x^38-328580*G^4*x^37+123905*G^4*x^36-282935*G^4*x^35+362245*G^4*x^34-212305*G^4*x^33+89665*G^4*x^32-76040*G^4*x^31+61515*G^4*x^30-19675*G^4*x^29-5515*G^4*x^28+6535*G^4*x^27-2020*G^4*x^26+225*G^4*x^25+4*G^3*x^52-36*G^3*x^51+128*G^3*x^50-344*G^3*x^49+1612*G^3*x^48-6116*G^3*x^47+10224*G^3*x^46+2044*G^3*x^45-30400*G^3*x^44+33424*G^3*x^43-13216*G^3*x^42+67192*G^3*x^41-193972*G^3*x^40+212300*G^3*x^39-80732*G^3*x^38+1792*G^3*x^37-56892*G^3*x^36+105564*G^3*x^35-76796*G^3*x^34+36476*G^3*x^33-22216*G^3*x^32+14552*G^3*x^31-4584*G^3*x^30-880*G^3*x^29+1200*G^3*x^28-368*G^3*x^27+40*G^3*x^26+6*G^2*x^49+54*G^2*x^48-732*G^2*x^47+2868*G^2*x^46-5109*G^2*x^45+4989*G^2*x^44-10077*G^2*x^43+34143*G^2*x^42-62454*G^2*x^41+54966*G^2*x^40-13716*G^2*x^39-9774*G^2*x^38-3276*G^2*x^37+19320*G^2*x^36-17334*G^2*x^35+8877*G^2*x^34-4476*G^2*x^33+2562*G^2*x^32-984*G^2*x^31+102*G^2*x^30+69*G^2*x^29-27*G^2*x^28+3*G^2*x^27+4*G*x^49-36*G*x^48+140*G*x^47-336*G*x^46+834*G*x^45-2482*G*x^44+5524*G*x^43-6930*G*x^42+2918*G*x^41+3808*G*x^40-5910*G*x^39+2158*G*x^38+1658*G*x^37-2150*G*x^36+1060*G*x^35-362*G*x^34+154*G*x^33-68*G*x^32+18*G*x^31-2*G*x^30+3*x^46-9*x^45-47*x^44+337*x^43-913*x^42+1406*x^41-1330*x^40+746*x^39-187*x^38-37*x^37+41*x^36-11*x^35+x^34)/x;
r:= (x^2*y - x*y + y - 1) / (x^2*y - x);
s:=(x*y - y + 1) / (x*y);
E:=[s-r*s+1,r*s-r^2*s,r*s-r^2*s,0,0];
P:=[0,0];
